first_run.rationale: The scores are identical. Both evaluations center on the exact same core issue: the candidate's lack of C++/Rust and distributed systems experience versus their strong full-stack and geospatial background. The differences in the specific wording of the strengths and concerns are minor rephrasings and fall within the bounds of typical run-to-run variation, with no new reasoning introduced that could be tied to the change in university.
